name: Amplitude Event
description: Schema for an Amplitude analytics event used in the HTTP V2 API and exported via the Export API. Represents a single user action or system occurrence tracked in Amplitude.

user_id.description: A readable user identifier. Required unless device_id is present.

device_id.description: A device-specific identifier. Required unless user_id is present.

event_type.description: The name of the event being tracked.

time.description: The timestamp of the event in milliseconds since epoch.

event_properties.description: A dictionary of key-value pairs representing properties of the event.

user_properties.description: A dictionary of key-value pairs representing properties of the user. Supports set, setOnce, add, append, prepend, unset, and remove operations.

groups.description: A dictionary of group type to group name mappings.

group_properties.description: A dictionary of key-value pairs representing properties of the group.

app_version.description: The version of the application sending the event.

platform.description: The platform of the device, such as iOS, Android, or Web.

os_name.description: The name of the operating system.

os_version.description: The version of the operating system.

region.description: The region or state of the user.

dma.description: The designated market area of the user.

language.description: The language setting of the user.

price.description: The price of the item purchased in a revenue event.

quantity.description: The quantity of the item purchased.

revenue.description: The revenue generated by the event. Use negative values for refunds.

productId.description: The identifier for the product in a revenue event.

revenueType.description: The type of revenue, such as purchase or refund.

location_lat.description: The latitude of the user's location.

location_lng.description: The longitude of the user's location.

ip.description: The IP address of the user. Use $remote to use the upload request IP.

adid.description: The Google Play Services advertising ID (Android).

event_id.description: An incrementing counter to distinguish events with identical user_id and timestamps.

session_id.description: The start time of the session in milliseconds since epoch. Use -1 for events outside a session.

insert_id.description: A unique identifier for deduplication. Amplitude deduplicates events with the same insert_id and device_id or user_id within 7 days.
